description: Add a dedicated VEO 3.1 video generation workflow with required start frame, optional end frame, persisted history, preview/download, rerun, and backend storage APIs.

userStories.title: Add video job persistence schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need database tables for video jobs and generated videos so that video history survives refreshes and can be queried safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Add video_jobs table with status, prompt, start/end blob refs, aspect ratio, resolution, duration, candidate count, and timestamps
Add generated_videos table linked to video_jobs with blob ref, source URL, duration, mime type, and created timestamp
Schema migration runs on startup without breaking existing data
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Create backend video job CRUD endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I want backend CRUD endpoints for video jobs so that the frontend can create, update, list, inspect, and delete persisted video tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: Add authenticated endpoints for GET list, GET by id, PUT upsert, and DELETE for /api/data/video-jobs
PUT endpoint validates required start frame and prompt fields and clamps candidate count to 1-4
List and detail responses include generated video rows for each job
Access control matches existing user/team ownership patterns
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Extend video request model for frame-to-frame input
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the video generation service to accept optional end frame and display parameters so that the new workflow can request VEO 3.1-compatible payloads.
acceptanceCriteria: Video request payload includes first frame, optional last frame, prompt, model, aspect ratio, resolution, and duration
Existing first-frame flow remains compatible through the same service module
Fallback video generation still works when upstream video generation is disabled
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add frontend video job service
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a client service that uploads frames, runs generation, persists results, and reloads history so that the UI can stay focused on workflow state.
acceptanceCriteria: Client service uploads start and optional end frame images to blob storage before saving a job
Client service runs 1-4 candidate generations and persists generated video blobs back to the server
Client service supports listing, deleting, and rerunning video jobs
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add dedicated video navigation entry
userStories.description: As a user, I want a top-level video generation entry in the app navigation so that I can access the workflow directly.
acceptanceCriteria: Nav rail includes a dedicated video generation button
Main content switches to a dedicated video page when the video navigation item is selected
Existing project, library, and admin navigation continue to work
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Tests pass

userStories.title: Build video generation form
userStories.description: As a user, I want to upload a start frame, optionally add an end frame, enter a prompt, and choose core parameters so that I can submit a VEO 3.1 video job.
acceptanceCriteria: Video page shows start frame upload, optional end frame upload, prompt field, duration, aspect ratio, resolution, and candidate count controls
Start frame and prompt are required before submit becomes available
Submit action calls the video job service with model fixed to veo-3.1
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show persisted video history and actions
userStories.description: As a user, I want to review prior video jobs, preview results, download them, rerun them, and delete them so that I can manage my outputs without leaving the workflow.
acceptanceCriteria: Video page lists persisted jobs with status, prompt summary, created time, and parameter badges
Each completed result shows an inline video preview and download action
Each job exposes rerun and delete actions
Failed jobs display the stored error message
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add regression coverage for the video workflow
userStories.description: As a developer, I want smoke and integration coverage for the new video workflow so that navigation, submission, and history actions remain stable.
acceptanceCriteria: Add smoke coverage that renders the core VEO video generation controls
Add integration coverage for submit flow with required fields and history refresh
Add integration coverage for rerun and delete actions
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
